Speechory
AI Voice Receptionist · Dental & Medical

The call you miss after hours is someone else’s patient by morning.

Speechory answers every call 24/7, books the appointment while the patient is still on the line, and hands you a clean schedule each morning. No voicemail. No missed bookings. No new hire.
